content: Part 0: shared dummy data (recipes, raw materials, groups)
Part A: Production backend + frontend (slips, start, complete)
Part B: Procurement backend + frontend (lean pending/approved/received)
Part C: Inventory backend + frontend (category blocks, drill-in, price history)
Part D: Dashboard backend + frontend (6 KPIs, recent orders, activity)
Self-check: lint, restart, curl full pipeline both paths, verify persistence across restart
